title: AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (G), GROUP II, PAGE 29, SUBPARAGRAPH (10), FOR THE PROVINCE OF BULACAN, PARAGRAPH "f," SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2976 / 55 OG No. 35, 7310 (August 31, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2455, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (

G

), GROUP II, PAGE 29, SUBPARAGRAPH (10), FOR THE PROVINCE OF BULACAN, PARAGRAPH "f," SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (

g

), group II, page 29, subparagraph (10), for the Province of Bulacan, paragraph "f," section two of Republic Act Numbered Sixteen hundred thirteen is amended to read as follows:

"(

g

)

Sta. Maria Public Market Acquisition of site and construction

P15.000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
